channel.title: Daily AI Brief
channel.description: Enterprise AI insights, curated daily by Cowork

item.title: AI Brief — March 10, 2026
item.description: Claude Opus 4.6 benchmarks, Google DeepMind's new reasoning model, and the rise of AI agents in enterprise workflows.

item.title: AI Brief — March 9, 2026
item.description: OpenAI ships GPT-5 Turbo API, enterprise adoption of AI coding assistants hits 60%, and the EU AI Act enforcement begins.

item.title: AI Brief — March 8, 2026
item.description: Google launches Gemini 2.5 Flash, MCP protocol gains universal adoption, and the first AI agent marketplace goes live.

item.title: AI Brief — March 7, 2026
item.description: Anthropic raises $5B Series E, the rise of 'AI-native' companies, and why prompt engineering is evolving into agent design.
